## Evidence

Attach logs, screenshots, recordings, or command output with secrets and private

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Defect is reproduced or a concrete blocked reason is recorded.
- [ ] Root cause is identified.
- [ ] Fix is verified with command/test/QA evidence.
- [ ] Regression coverage is added when practical.
- [ ] Docs are updated or a no-update reason is stated.
